title: TRAI releases Consultation Paper on Formulation of a Regulatory Framework for Application-based Linear Television distribution (ALTD) Services (Including Free Ad-Supported Streaming Television (FAST) Services)
description: TRAI releases Consultation Paper on Formulation of a Regulatory Framework for Application-based Linear Television distribution (ALTD) Services (Including Free Ad-Supported Streaming Television (FAST) Services) nitinkumar Mon, 04/06/2026 - 15:35 File Press Release No. 48 (706.97 KB) Date Mon, 04/06/2026 - 12:00
